title: Phase 16.12 — Full Sitemap URL Inspection + T1 Ranking Failure Diagnosis — PROGRESS REPORT
status: IN PROGRESS — Inspection running (76/649). T1 diagnosis COMPLETE. Quick wins APPLIED.

task8_quick_wins.result: investment-return + tax-calculator now have CTR-optimized titles in page.tsx ctrTitles map

task11_deploy.status: ⏳ PENDING — code changed but not deployed

discovered_not_indexed.description: Google knows about these URLs but hasn't indexed them yet — normal for a young site

unknown_to_google.description: Google doesn't even know these URLs exist — they're in sitemap but not discovered

duplicate_canonical.description: Google chose a different canonical than we declared

partial_inspection_findings_76_urls.early_warning: 47.4% of inspected URLs are 'Discovered - not indexed'. For a 6-month-old site this is high but explainable by low domain authority — Google crawls but doesn't index without trust signals.

tier1_diagnosis_summary.finding: All 3 buried T1 calculators (retirement-planning, investment-return, tax-calculator) are INDEXED but rank at positions 71-99 due to DOMAIN AUTHORITY CEILING, not on-page issues.
tier1_diagnosis_summary.primary_root_cause: 6-month-old domain with 0 backlinks cannot compete for head terms against DR 70-100 competitors (NerdWallet, Bankrate, Calculator.net, IRS.gov, SmartAsset)

secondary_causes.tax_calculator: Generic title + query-year mismatch (getting 2022/2023 traffic on 2026 page)
secondary_causes.retirement_planning: Well-optimized but ceiling is domain authority

fixes_applied: Added CTR-optimized title for investment-return: 'See Your Money Grow: Free Investment Return Calculator (2026)'
Added CTR-optimized title for tax-calculator: 'Estimate Your Tax Bill: Free 2026 Tax Calculator'
tier1_diagnosis_summary.expected_impact: Marginal — titles help CTR but won't overcome domain authority gap. Real ranking improvement requires backlinks over 3-12 months.

serp_competitor_summary.finding: All 3 head terms are dominated by DR 70-100 sites with 250-5,000+ backlinks. QFINHUB (DR ~0-5) cannot compete directly for 12-24 months.
serp_competitor_summary.strategy_recommendation: Target long-tail informational queries with supporting content. Build domain authority through backlinks. Revisit head terms when DR reaches 40+.

ctr_titles.note: Code change applied but NOT yet deployed. Requires git commit + push.

next_steps.immediate: Wait for inspection to complete → run Tasks 3-4 (grouping + gap analysis)
next_steps.deploy: git commit CTR title fixes + push to deploy
next_steps.phase_16_13: Based on inspection results: prioritize indexing improvements for discovered-not-indexed pages, apply FAQ schema, build content for query-mismatch pages
